\tzpentry{ID5819}{Angular Velocity Relation}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5819 introduces Angular Velocity Relation as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[

\]
